overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing third-person exploration of a dystopian urban neighborhood mixing traditional Japanese architecture with futuristic skyscrapers. The player character walks along sidewalks, crosses streets, and navigates through a gritty residential area with overgrown vegetation and scattered debris.

events.description: character begins walking forward along the sidewalk
approaching intersection, view opens up from enclosed sidewalk

agents.ego_description: character walking along sidewalk past trash bags and industrial buildings, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: NPC in red pants standing with arms crossed near the corner, then walking away

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a narrow sidewalk enclosed by a tall industrial building wall with accumulated trash bags. The character walks forward toward an intersection, passing an NPC in red pants. The environment is gritty and urban with limited sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with multi-lane road and palm tree lining

events.description: exits covered sidewalk into open intersection with wider street view
crossing the street while cars pass by on the road

pedestrian in gray outfit walking along the sidewalk in the same direction

traffic signal pole at the intersection with pedestrian crossing signals

gray sedan parked behind the red car
concrete utility pole with electrical transformers and wires

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the enclosed sidewalk into a wide-open intersection, crossing the street amidst light traffic. The scene features palm tree-lined streets with parked cars and a clear view of the sky. The character turns right and continues along the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with traditional Japanese houses and overgrown yards

passing through a group of pedestrians on the sidewalk

NPC with red hair and black vest walking toward the camera

entered.detail: green wooden traditional house with covered porch and blue plastic chair
yellow traditional house with solar panels installed on the sloped roof
tall dry grass and weeds growing in front yards and sidewalk cracks
large yellow industrial building with graffiti and external air conditioning units
wall with prominent red and blue graffiti art including stylized text

segments.scene_description: The character enters a residential area featuring traditional Japanese wooden houses with overgrown vegetation in the front yards. The sidewalk runs past a yellow industrial building with graffiti on the right. The character passes several pedestrians including a shirtless man and a person with red hair.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley between industrial buildings with scattered debris

events.description: turning right into a narrow alleyway between tall walls
continuing straight through the narrow alley with scattered trash

agents.ego_description: character turns into a narrow alleyway and continues forward through the enclosed space

yellow industrial building wall with large spoon graffiti and air conditioning units
litter and debris including paper and cardboard scattered across the alley floor
colorful graffiti tags and artwork on the concrete wall

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a narrow enclosed alleyway between tall concrete and industrial walls. The ground is littered with scattered trash and debris. The alley provides a confined view with buildings on both sides and limited sky visibility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into an open urban intersection before winding through a residential neighborhood and back into a confined alley. It begins on a narrow sidewalk enclosed by a towering industrial wall and piles of trash bags, moving forward past a pedestrian in red pants toward a distant crossing. As the character emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens into a wide, sunlit intersection lined with palm trees and parked cars, where the camera follows a right turn along the road. The environment then shifts into a residential district characterized by traditional Japanese wooden houses with overgrown yards and graffiti-covered industrial walls, passing several pedestrians along the way. Finally, the view tightens as the camera turns right once more, entering a narrow alleyway flanked by high concrete walls and littered with scattered debris.
